name: xf_cep_acc_updel_flush_win
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: D-155 residual -> D-160 FIXED (graduated): the windowed twin - update-admits then same-epoch delete; the oracle fires the net-zero W:0. The D-155 drain skipped since-deleted facts; D-160 replaces the is_alive skip with ENTRY-ORDER aliveness (a fact deleted by a LATER Del entry still executes its upd entry - winacc_step on retained fields) and the Del entry's annihilation force-re-emits the left.
